text: I have a small family and many good friends.
My best friend is tall and very friendly.
He is a tall, friendly boy.
What is she like? She is generous.
What does she look like? She is tall.
Hi Carolina! There is a new student in my class. What does she look like?
She is a tall girl with long curly hair and a few freckles. She is very pretty.
Nice! And what is she like? Is she friendly?
She is a little shy at first, but she is generous and very polite.
She sounds great. Does she look like anyone in her family?
Yes! She looks like her older brother. They both have the same cheerful smile.
He is shy at first, but very brave.

Today I want to introduce a character from a new story. Her name is Clara, and she is fifteen years old. Clara is a tall, cheerful girl with long curly hair and a few freckles on her face. She looks like her grandmother in the old family photos. But what is she really like? Clara is very generous and polite. She always shares her lunch with her friends and helps the new students at school. She is also brave, because she is never afraid to ask questions in class. Some people think she is a little shy at first, but when you know her, she talks and laughs all day. A good character is not only a face. A good character has a personality. So when you describe a person, tell us how they look and what they are like.

Hi, this is Carolina, and I want to tell you about my best friend, Marina. Marina is a short, cheerful girl with straight brown hair and big brown eyes. She looks like her mother, and they have the same lovely smile. But the best part of Marina is her personality. She is very generous and always shares her snacks with me. She is also polite and kind to everyone at school. Marina is a little shy with new people, but she is very brave on the handball court. When I write a story, I sometimes think about Marina, because she is a wonderful person to describe. A good friend is easy to describe, because you know how they look and what they are like.

Carolina wants to create a new character for her story. First, she chooses the hair: long and curly. Then she adds the face, with a few freckles. After that, she thinks about the personality, generous and brave. Finally, she writes the name of the character at the top of the page.
What does the new boy look like?
My friend looks like her grandmother.
He is a little shy, but very brave.
She is very generous and shares her snacks.
What is she like? She is generous.
He is shy at first, but very brave.
